purpose: Manual user confirmation schema. Do not treat a blank or partially filled record as permission.

field_rules.terms_accepted_by_user: must be true only after the user manually accepts or verifies official dataset terms
field_rules.official_terms_url: official page or official terms/license URL; not a random mirror
field_rules.accepted_terms_version_or_access_date: terms version if known, otherwise date accessed by user
field_rules.allowed_use: e.g. research_only, academic_noncommercial, commercial_allowed, unknown; user-provided
field_rules.local_path: absolute local path to the official/source-identified dataset copy
field_rules.source_identity: official archive/file/source name or source-specific subdirectory identity
field_rules.confirmed_by_user: short user confirmation string; not filled by the agent

hard_blocks: official_terms_url is blank or not official
non_claims: This schema does not grant permission.
This schema does not convert or evaluate data.
This schema does not allow metric/seconds-level claims.
